name: ReadFlow
description: Local-first read-it-later with instant Instapaper import. No cloud sync required.

target.name: Instapaper
target.pain: Kobo sync broken since 2024, $30/yr Premium wall for basic features, cloud dependency
signals: Reddit: 'Instapaper Kobo sync has been broken for months'
Twitter: 'Why am I paying $30/yr for something that doesn't work?'
HN: 'Instapaper was acquired and abandoned, looking for alternatives'

north_star.definition: Articles successfully imported from Instapaper CSV

vulture_hook: Instant 'Import from Instapaper CSV' with local-first reading mode
user_archetype: I'm a reader who saved hundreds of articles in Instapaper but can't sync to my Kobo anymore. I want my articles accessible offline without paying $30/yr for broken sync.

aha_moment.tagline: Your reading list is now free. Forever.

core_features.name: Instapaper CSV Import
core_features.description: Parse Instapaper export, extract articles with metadata

core_features.name: Article Reader View
core_features.description: Clean, distraction-free reading with dark mode

core_features.name: Rescue Audit UI
core_features.description: Show import stats, reading time, savings

core_features.name: Browser Save Button
core_features.description: Save current page to reading list

rescue_metrics.reading_time_hours: Estimated based on word count (200 WPM)

copy.trust_message: Your articles stay on your device
copy.rescue_complete: You just rescued [COUNT] articles from Instapaper

author: 864zeros
